content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async(loadUser)∧await(db_findUser)∧next(err)
P: missing_id_before_db∧not_found_before_audit∧db_err->next(err)∧same_order∧minimal_async_await
V: same_order
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async(loadUser) and await(db_findUser) and next(err).
Plan: missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and db_err then next(err) and same validation order and minimal async/await migration.
Verify: same validation order.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

G: refactor(createInvoice)
C: async_await(createInvoice)∧same_order(validate_input,db.createInvoice,audit.log,queue.publish,res.json)∧one_next(err)
P: db_err->next(err)→minimal_async_await(createInvoice)
V: missing_id_before_db∧await(audit.log)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(createInvoice).
Constraints: async/await(createInvoice) and same validation order(validate_input, db.createInvoice, audit.log, queue.publish, res.json) and one_next(err).
Plan: db_err then next(err) then minimal async/await migration(createInvoice).
Verify: missing id check before database call and await(audit.log).

G: refactor(verifyWebhook)
C: async_await∧minimal_change
P: raw_body→verifySignature→parse_json→db.insertEvent→next∧db_err->next(err)
V: same_order∧one_next(err)∧minimal_async_await
R: !missing_id_before_db∧!

G: refactor(sendEmailReceipt)
C: async_await(sendEmailReceipt)∧minimal_change(sendEmailReceipt)
P: db_err->next(err)∧same_order(load_user,render_template,smtp.send,audit.log,next)
V: async∧await∧next(err)
R: !reorder∧!

G: refactor(reconcileBatch)
C: async_await∧minimal_async_await∧same_order(load_batch,db.fetchRows,apply_rules,db.save,emit_metrics)
P: db.fetchRows_err→next(err)∧db.save_err→next(err)
V: "async"∧"await"

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(reconcileBatch).
Constraints: async/await and minimal async/await migration and same validation order(load_batch, db.fetchRows, apply_rules, db.save, emit_metrics).
Plan: db.fetchRows_err then next(err) and db.save_err then next(err).
Verify: "async" and "await".

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: async_await(syncSearchIndex) ∧ minimal_async_await ∧ same_order(load_doc,transform,index.upsert,audit.log,done) ∧ db_err->next(err)
C: same_order
V: same_order
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: async/await(syncSearchIndex) and minimal async/await migration and same validation order(load_doc, transform, index.upsert, audit.log, done) and db_err then next(err).
Constraints: same validation order.
Verify: same validation order.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

G: refactor(bustProfileCache)
C: async_await∧minimal_async_await∧same_order(load_user,cache.del,cache.prime,audit.log,next)
P: db_err->next(err)
V: one_next(err)∧await(cache.set)∧await(audit.log)
R: !missing

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(bustProfileCache).
Constraints: async/await and minimal async/await migration and same validation order(load_user, cache.del, cache.prime, audit.log, next).
Plan: db_err then next(err).
Verify: one_next(err) and await(cache.set) and await(audit.log).
Risk: high-risk missing.

G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: async_await(loadGatewayUser)∧same_order(session_check,db.findUser,flags.load,audit.log,next)∧one_next(err)
P: db.findUser_err→next(err)∧await(audit.log)∧minimal_async_await
V: missing_id

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadGatewayUser).
Constraints: async/await(loadGatewayUser) and same validation order(session_check, db.findUser, flags.load, audit.log, next) and one_next(err).
Plan: db.findUser_err then next(err) and await(audit.log) and minimal async/await migration.
Verify: missing_id.
